en.title: Best GLP-1 Companion Supplements 2026
en.description: The supplements worth taking alongside Ozempic, Wegovy, Zepbound and other GLP-1 medications to protect muscle, fill nutrient gaps and ease side effects.

zh-tw.description: 搭配 Ozempic、Wegovy、Zepbound 等 GLP-1 減重針劑使用，幫你保住肌肉、補足營養缺口、緩解副作用的補給品實測推薦。

en.description: A four-product daily system bundling Basic Nutrients multivitamin, Complete Biotic, Amino Complex and Daily Electrolytes, covering muscle, gut and hydration in one routine with NSF and TGA-grade manufacturing.

zh-tw.description: 一次到位的四件式每日系統，含綜合維他命、益生菌、胺基酸與電解質粉，肌肉、腸胃、補水一套全包，工廠等級是運動員信賴的 NSF 規格。

en.description: Delivers 20 g of protein plus clinically studied myHMB to defend against muscle loss, with added calcium and vitamin D for bone strength, formulated with obesity researcher Louis Aronne, MD.

zh-tw.description: 每份 20 克蛋白質再加上有臨床實證的 myHMB 專門對抗肌肉流失，另外補鈣和維他命 D 顧骨密度，配方由肥胖研究權威 Louis Aronne 醫師參與設計。

en.description: 28 g of grass-fed whey isolate per scoop with a fully disclosed label, no artificial sweeteners and third-party testing, the cleanest way to hit protein targets when appetite is low.

zh-tw.description: 每匙 28 克草飼乳清分離蛋白，成分全標示，不加人工甜味劑還通過第三方檢驗，胃口差的時候要補到蛋白目標，這罐是最乾淨的選擇。

zh-tw.description: 30 天份的每日隨身包，把綜合維他命加上鎂、鈣、維他命 D 和 B12 一起打包，藥妝通路就買得到，吃得少造成的日常營養缺口靠它補最方便。

en.description: A plant-based powder using eriomin lemon flavonoids and fiber to support the body's own GLP-1 production and curb cravings, a clean pick for anyone who wants gut-first support over pills.

zh-tw.description: 植物性粉劑，用檸檬類黃酮 eriomin 加纖維幫身體自己分泌 GLP-1、壓下想吃的慾望，想從腸道著手、不想吞一堆膠囊的人可以看這款。

en.description: A dietitian-formulated, doctor-approved line spanning protein, multivitamins and digestive support, the first major retailer collection built end to end for GLP-1 users.

zh-tw.description: 營養師配方、醫師背書的整條產品線，蛋白、綜合維他命、腸胃保健都有，是大型連鎖通路第一個從頭為 GLP-1 用藥族群打造的完整系列。

en.description: A capsule blend layering creatine, UC-II collagen, chelated iron and adaptogens like ashwagandha and lion's mane, aimed at users who want muscle, joint and mood support in one bottle.

zh-tw.description: 膠囊複方，把肌酸、UC-II 膠原蛋白、螯合鐵，再配上南非醉茄、猴頭菇這類適應原一起疊，想一瓶顧到肌肉、關節加情緒的人適合。

en.description: A minimalist range built on short ingredient lists and third-party testing, delivering protein and fiber with no fillers or artificial additives for purists who read every label.

zh-tw.description: 走極簡路線，成分表短、通過第三方檢驗，蛋白和纖維都給你，不加填充劑也不加人工添加物，會逐項看標示的成分黨最愛這種。

en.description: A high-potency multivitamin using methylated vitamins, chelated minerals and delayed-release technology to raise absorption, a smart standalone base when you already have protein covered.

zh-tw.description: 高劑量綜合維他命，用甲基化維生素、螯合礦物質加延遲釋放技術把吸收拉高，蛋白質已經另外補足的話，拿它當基礎打底很聰明。

references.title: The Best Supplements for GLP-1 Weight Loss Treatment Users 2026
Doctor-formulated GLP-1 support supplements launched by wellness brand youtheory
The Vitamin Shoppe Unveils First-of-its-Kind Supplement Line Formulated for GLP-1 Users
Protein Powder on GLP-1 Medications: Closing the Muscle-Preservation Gap

en.commentary: The question with GLP-1 companion supplements is not which one has the prettiest label, it is which one protects the thing you are most likely to lose: muscle. Roughly a third of the weight people drop on Ozempic, Wegovy and Zepbound comes from lean mass when they do nothing to defend it, and that is the metric I rank on first. Thorne's GLP-1 Support Stack takes the top spot because it is the only option here that treats the problem as a system, bundling protein-building amino acids, a full multivitamin, gut support and electrolytes in one NSF-grade routine, so you are not assembling four separate purchases and hoping the doses line up. Youtheory's Muscle Guard Protein earns second on the strength of its myHMB dose, a leucine metabolite with real clinical backing for holding onto muscle during a calorie deficit, paired with 20 grams of protein in a shake that goes down easily when appetite is gone. Transparent Labs sits third as the purist's protein: 28 grams of grass-fed isolate, a label with nothing hidden, and third-party testing to back it. Everything below that is about matching your specific gap, whether that is the drugstore convenience of Nature Made, the gut-first approach of Ora, or the constipation relief of a targeted probiotic. Buy for the deficiency you actually have.

highlights.title: Muscle preservation is the whole game, so rank for it
highlights.body: The single biggest risk on a GLP-1 is losing lean mass alongside fat, and the research puts that loss near a third of total weight dropped without intervention. That is why I weight muscle support heaviest. Products that deliver clinically dosed protein plus myHMB or creatine do the one job the medication cannot, and they belong at the top of any honest ranking.

highlights.title: Thorne wins because it solves the whole problem, not one slice of it
highlights.body: Most GLP-1 users need protein, vitamins, gut support and electrolytes at the same time, and buying those piecemeal invites gaps and overlaps. Thorne's Stack bundles all four into a single daily routine at NSF manufacturing standards, which is why it takes the top spot. You pay $154, but you replace four separate decisions with one.

highlights.title: myHMB is the ingredient that separates a real muscle product from a marketing one
highlights.body: Youtheory's Muscle Guard Protein reaches second because it pairs 20 grams of protein with a clinically studied dose of myHMB, formulated with obesity physician Louis Aronne. HMB has human data for reducing muscle breakdown during weight loss, and shakes solve the appetite problem better than pills when you can barely finish a meal.

highlights.title: A drugstore packet can beat a boutique stack on value
highlights.body: Nature Made's GLP-1 Companion Health Pack lands fourth by covering the everyday vitamin, magnesium, calcium and B12 gaps for around $25 a month, available at any pharmacy. It will not preserve muscle the way a protein does, so I would pair it with a shake, but as a daily nutrient floor it is the best value on this list.

highlights.title: Match the supplement to your actual side effect
highlights.body: The lower half of this ranking is not weaker, it is more specific. Ora's GLP-1 Up and Codeage's Probiotic+ target the constipation and gut sluggishness that dominate the first months on medication, using fiber, prebiotics and Akkermansia. If nausea and bathroom trouble are your problem, these beat any general multivitamin for you.

zh-tw.commentary: 挑 GLP-1 配套營養品，重點從來不是哪一款包裝好看，而是哪一款能護住你最容易掉的東西，也就是肌肉。老實說，打 Ozempic、Wegovy、Zepbound 的人如果什麼都不做，掉下來的體重大約有三分之一是肌肉而不是脂肪，所以我排名第一個看的就是這個指標。Thorne 的 GLP-1 Support Stack 拿下第一，因為它是這份榜單裡唯一把問題當成一套系統來解的，胺基酸、綜合維他命、腸胃保健、電解質一次打包成 NSF 等級的每日流程，你不用自己湊四罐再祈禱劑量剛好對得上。Youtheory 的 Muscle Guard Protein 排第二，靠的是它的 myHMB，這是有臨床實證能在熱量赤字下保住肌肉的白胺酸代謝物，再配 20 克蛋白，胃口沒了的時候一杯搖搖就喝得下去。Transparent Labs 排第三，是成分黨的蛋白首選，28 克草飼分離蛋白、成分全標示、第三方檢驗都到位。再往下就看你缺什麼補什麼，要嘛是 Nature Made 的藥妝便利，要嘛是 Ora 的腸道優先，要嘛是專攻便秘的益生菌。缺哪塊補哪塊，這樣買最實在。

highlights.title: 保肌肉才是這場的重點，排名就該照這個排
highlights.body: 打 GLP-1 最大的風險就是脂肪和肌肉一起掉，研究把沒介入時的肌肉流失估到接近總減重的三分之一。所以我把肌肉支持這一項的權重壓最重。能給到臨床劑量蛋白再加 myHMB 或肌酸的產品，做的正是針劑做不到的那件事，任何誠實的榜單都該把它們放最前面。

highlights.title: Thorne 贏在它解的是整個問題，不是其中一塊
highlights.body: 多數 GLP-1 用藥的人同時需要蛋白、維他命、腸胃保健和電解質，一罐一罐分開買很容易漏東漏西又互相重疊。Thorne 的 Stack 把四樣併成一套每日流程，工廠還是 NSF 等級，這就是它拿第一的原因。價格是 154 美元，換算約台幣四千九，但你用一個決定取代了四個決定。

highlights.title: 有沒有 myHMB，是真肌肉產品跟行銷話術的分水嶺
highlights.body: Youtheory 的 Muscle Guard Protein 排第二，因為它把 20 克蛋白配上有臨床實證的 myHMB 劑量，配方還有肥胖科醫師 Louis Aronne 參與。HMB 有人體數據支持能在減重期間減少肌肉分解，而且飯都快吃不完的時候，喝的比吞膠囊更能解決胃口的問題。

highlights.title: 論 CP 值，藥妝隨身包能贏精品組合
highlights.body: Nature Made 的 GLP-1 Companion Health Pack 排第四，一個月大約台幣八百就把日常的維他命、鎂、鈣、B12 缺口補起來，藥局隨手就買得到。它沒辦法像蛋白那樣保肌肉，所以我會搭一杯蛋白一起用，但當作每天的營養打底，它是這份榜單裡 CP 值最高的。

highlights.title: 照你實際的副作用去對症下藥
highlights.body: 榜單後半段不是比較弱，是比較專。Ora 的 GLP-1 Up 和 Codeage 的 Probiotic+ 用纖維、益生元加 Akkermansia 菌株，專打用藥前幾個月最惱人的便秘和腸胃遲滯。如果你的困擾是噁心和上廁所不順，這兩款對你來說贏過任何一款泛用綜合維他命。

HTBA to unveil GLP-1 support ingredient for muscle health and energy at Vitafoods Europe 2026
Drug enhances muscle repair during GLP-1 weight-loss treatment in mice

en.commentary: The clinical conversation this week keeps landing on the same point I have been making all year: on a GLP-1, protein plus resistance training is the load-bearing wall, and everything else is decoration. The American Diabetes Association highlighted new data on preserving lean mass during weight loss, and Stanford researchers described a muscle-repair pathway that could one day pair with these drugs. That research reinforces why I keep Thorne's GLP-1 Support Stack at the top. It covers the exact gaps a shrinking appetite creates, and its NSF-level testing gives me confidence in every capsule. Youtheory Muscle Guard and Transparent Labs Whey Isolate hold second and third because they deliver the clinically backed protein doses that actually protect muscle, which is the whole game right now. Nature Made's companion multi stays my value pick for anyone who wants broad micronutrient coverage without overthinking it. Ora GLP-1 Up remains the one I reach for when nausea and slow digestion are the main complaint, since its enzyme and ginger blend earns its digestion score. My advice this month is simple: pick the product that closes your specific gap, hit 1.2 to 1.6 grams of protein per kilo daily, and lift twice a week. The supplement supports that routine. It never replaces it. That framing is why my ranking barely moves week to week, and I think stability here is a feature, not a shortfall.

highlights.title: Muscle preservation goes mainstream
highlights.body: The ADA spotlighted new therapies aimed at protecting lean mass during GLP-1 weight loss, validating why muscle-focused companions sit near the top of my list.

highlights.title: Thorne keeps the crown
highlights.body: Its GLP-1 Support Stack closes the micronutrient and protein gaps a suppressed appetite creates, and its testing rigor keeps it my number one.

highlights.title: Protein is the priority
highlights.body: Youtheory Muscle Guard and Transparent Labs Whey Isolate rank high because clinically dosed protein plus lifting is what actually preserves muscle.

highlights.title: Digestion support has a place
highlights.body: Ora GLP-1 Up stays my pick for nausea and sluggish digestion, the two side effects that most often derail early GLP-1 users.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週的臨床討論又回到我整年一直強調的重點：打 GLP-1 的時候，蛋白質加上重量訓練才是承重牆，其他都只是裝飾。美國糖尿病學會這週公布了減重期間保留肌肉的新數據，史丹佛的研究團隊也描述了一條有機會跟這類藥物搭配的肌肉修復路徑。這些研究正好說明我為什麼一直把 Thorne 的 GLP-1 Support Stack 放在第一。它剛好補上食慾下降後最容易缺的那幾塊，加上 NSF 等級的檢測，我對每一顆膠囊都有信心。Youtheory Muscle Guard 跟 Transparent Labs 乳清分離蛋白排二、三名，因為它們提供的是有臨床劑量、真的能守住肌肉的蛋白質，而這正是現在最關鍵的事。Nature Made 的綜合配方還是我推薦給預算族的首選，想要廣泛補齊微量營養又不想想太多的人選它就對了。Ora GLP-1 Up 則是我在噁心跟消化變慢時會拿出來的那一罐，它的酵素加薑配方撐得起消化這項分數。這個月我的建議很單純：挑能補你那塊缺口的產品，每天每公斤吃到 1.2 到 1.6 克蛋白質，一週練兩次重量。補充品是來輔助這套習慣的，它永遠取代不了習慣。這也是為什麼我的排名每週幾乎不動，我覺得這種穩定本身就是優點。

highlights.title: 保留肌肉變成主流話題
highlights.body: 美國糖尿病學會點名了減重期間保護肌肉的新療法，正好印證我把主打肌肉的搭配補充品放前面的判斷。

highlights.title: Thorne 穩坐冠軍
highlights.body: 它的 GLP-1 Support Stack 補上食慾被壓下去後最缺的微量營養跟蛋白質，加上嚴謹的檢測，讓它一直是我的第一名。

highlights.title: 蛋白質才是重點
highlights.body: Youtheory Muscle Guard 跟 Transparent Labs 乳清分離蛋白排名高，因為有臨床劑量的蛋白質加上練重量，才是真的守得住肌肉的作法。

highlights.title: 消化支援有它的位子
highlights.body: Ora GLP-1 Up 還是我對付噁心跟消化變慢的首選，這兩個副作用最常讓剛開始打 GLP-1 的人撐不下去。

en.commentary: The Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack keeps my top recommendation, and the latest research this week reinforces exactly why. New coverage of muscle-preservation science, including the BELIEVE study pairing semaglutide with muscle-targeting therapy, confirms what this category has been circling all year: protecting lean mass is the central job of a GLP-1 companion. Thorne's four-part stack covers that with its Amino Complex for lean muscle, plus Basic Nutrients, Complete Biotic, and Daily Electrolytes, and its 9.8 testing score reflects the third-party rigor I want when someone is layering supplements onto a prescription. This is the complete, trustworthy pick. The Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein holds second with the highest muscle score here at 9.7, and for anyone whose main worry is losing strength on a GLP-1, protein-forward support remains the priority. Experts now cite 1.2 to 1.6 grams of protein per kilogram daily as the effective range, which is exactly what a product like this helps you hit. Transparent Labs Whey Isolate stays third for the same reason with cleaner sourcing. The Nature Made GLP-1 Companion keeps fourth as the value and convenience pick, a 9.6 value and 9.5 convenience, ideal for someone who wants nutrient-gap coverage without a cabinet of bottles. No rank moved this week. The science is trending toward muscle preservation, which the current order already reflects, so I held every score from last week rather than manufacture a change.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack 這週還是我的首選，最新的研究正好說明為什麼。這週關於肌肉保存的科學報導，包括把 semaglutide 跟針對肌肉的療法搭在一起的 BELIEVE 研究，都印證了這個類別整年在講的重點：保住瘦肉組織才是 GLP-1 輔助品的核心工作。Thorne 這套四合一組合就顧到了這點，Amino Complex 顧瘦肌肉，加上 Basic Nutrients、Complete Biotic 跟 Daily Electrolytes，9.8 的檢測分數反映出我要的第三方嚴謹度，畢竟這是疊在處方藥上面吃的東西。這是最完整、最讓人放心的選擇。Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein 守第二，9.7 的肌肉分數全場最高，如果你最擔心的是打 GLP-1 掉肌力，蛋白質為主的補充就是優先。專家現在講的有效範圍是每公斤體重每天 1.2 到 1.6 克蛋白質，這類產品正好幫你補到位。Transparent Labs Whey Isolate 守第三，一樣的理由加上更乾淨的原料。Nature Made GLP-1 Companion 守第四，性價比跟方便的選擇，9.6 性價比加 9.5 便利，適合想補營養缺口又不想搞一櫃瓶罐的人。這週沒有名次變動。科學正往肌肉保存的方向走，而目前的排序已經反映了這點，所以我把每一名的分數都跟上週保持一樣，不硬造變化。

references.title: Oh!mino Survey Finds GLP-1 Muscle Loss Concerns Drive New Focus on Preserving Muscle
New GLP-1 Therapies Enhance Quality of Weight Loss by Improving Muscle Preservation
GLP-1 companion supplements and post-medication nutrition tap metabolic health demand

en.commentary: Muscle preservation is the story of the week, and it keeps my ranking pointed exactly where it already was. A fresh Oh!mino survey published July 10 confirms that people on GLP-1 medication now rank losing muscle as a top worry, and clinicians keep repeating the same fix: hit 1.2 to 1.6 grams of protein per kilogram, add resistance training, and support the nutrient gaps the drugs open up. That is why the Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack holds my number one. It covers the widest nutrient gap, carries the cleanest third-party testing in the group, and pairs muscle support with digestion help in one system. Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein and Transparent Labs Whey Isolate stay second and third because they lead on the single factor that matters most right now, protein quality that actually protects lean mass while the appetite is suppressed. Nature Made's GLP-1 Companion keeps fourth as the value and convenience pick for anyone who wants broad nutrient coverage in an easy daily format without a premium price. Ora and Vitamin Shoppe hold the middle for digestion-forward and all-in-one shoppers. My guidance is consistent with the science this week. If you are on a GLP-1 drug, build the base around protein and testing first, then layer in the micronutrients. Thorne if you want the complete tested stack, Youtheory or Transparent Labs if protein is your priority, and Nature Made if budget and simplicity lead your decision.

highlights.title: Thorne leads on completeness
highlights.body: The widest nutrient-gap coverage plus the cleanest third-party testing keep the GLP-1 Support Stack my number one as muscle worries rise.

highlights.title: Protein is the priority factor
highlights.body: Youtheory Muscle Guard and Transparent Labs hold second and third because lean-mass protection is exactly what July's clinical guidance stresses.

highlights.title: Survey confirms the trend
highlights.body: A July 10 Oh!mino survey shows GLP-1 users now rank muscle loss as a top concern, reinforcing why muscle-first picks stay near the top.

highlights.title: Nature Made for value
highlights.body: Broad nutrient coverage in an easy daily format at a friendly price keeps it my pick for budget-focused shoppers.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週的主軸就是肌肉保留,而它剛好把我的排名穩穩定在原本的位置。Oh!mino 七月十號剛出的調查證實,打 GLP-1 減重藥的人現在最擔心的就是掉肌肉,醫師講來講去也是同一套解法,每公斤補 1.2 到 1.6 克蛋白質,加上阻力訓練,再把藥物造成的營養缺口補起來。所以 Thorne 的 GLP-1 Support Stack 我還是放第一,它把最廣的營養缺口都顧到,第三方檢驗在整組裡最乾淨,還把肌肉支援跟消化幫助包在同一套系統裡。Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein 跟 Transparent Labs 乳清分離守二三名,因為它們在現在最關鍵的那個項目上最強,就是食慾被壓下去時還能真的保住瘦肉的蛋白質品質。Nature Made 的 GLP-1 Companion 排第四,是想要營養顧得廣、每天吃又方便、價格不貴的人的首選。Ora 跟 Vitamin Shoppe 守中段,分別給重消化跟想一瓶搞定的人。這週建議跟科學一致,有在打 GLP-1 的人先把基底建立在蛋白質跟檢驗上,再疊微量營養素。要完整又檢驗過就選 Thorne,蛋白質擺第一就挑 Youtheory 或 Transparent Labs,預算跟簡單優先就選 Nature Made。

highlights.title: Thorne 勝在完整
highlights.body: 營養缺口顧得最廣、第三方檢驗最乾淨,掉肌肉的焦慮升溫時它穩坐第一。

highlights.body: Youtheory Muscle Guard 跟 Transparent Labs 守二三名,保住瘦肉正好是七月臨床建議最強調的。

HTBA to unveil GLP-1 support ingredient for muscle health and energy at Vitafoods Europe 2026
Drug enhances muscle repair during GLP-1 weight-loss treatment in mice

en.commentary: If you are on a GLP-1 and shopping for a companion stack, muscle preservation is the metric that should drive your pick, and that is exactly why Thorne's GLP-1 Support Stack stays on top this week. A fresh Oh!mino survey of more than 500 GLP-1 users landed on July 9, and the headline number is hard to ignore: lean mass can account for a quarter to 40 percent of everything you lose on these drugs. That is the gap a good companion supplement is built to close. Thorne earns the number one spot because it pairs genuine muscle support with NSF-caliber third-party testing, and on a category this loosely regulated that testing pedigree is worth real money. Youtheory Muscle Guard and Transparent Labs Whey Isolate sit right behind it because protein plus leucine remains the most evidence-backed way to hold onto muscle while appetite is suppressed. For anyone whose main complaint is nausea and a shrinking appetite, Nature Made's GLP-1 Companion and Ora GLP-1 Up cover the nutrient-gap and digestive side of the equation at a friendlier price. The science is moving fast here. Stanford published mouse data in June showing a compound that boosts muscle repair during weight loss, and HTBA is bringing a dedicated GLP-1 muscle ingredient to Vitafoods this year, so expect this shelf to get more crowded. For now, buy for third-party testing first, protein second, and treat the rest as insurance. I kept the ranking steady this week because the survey confirms the thesis rather than reshuffling the products.

highlights.title: Muscle loss is the real risk
highlights.body: The July Oh!mino survey puts lean mass at 25 to 40 percent of total weight lost on GLP-1 drugs. That single number is why every top pick here leads with muscle preservation, and why protein plus resistance training belongs in the plan.

highlights.title: Thorne wins on testing
highlights.body: Thorne's GLP-1 Support Stack combines credible muscle support with rigorous third-party verification. In a category with minimal pre-market oversight, that verified purity is what separates a supplement you can trust from marketing.

highlights.title: Protein does the heavy lifting
highlights.body: Youtheory Muscle Guard and Transparent Labs Whey Isolate rank high because whey plus leucine is the best-supported route to holding muscle while appetite is down. If you buy one thing, make it quality protein.

highlights.title: Budget picks cover the gaps
highlights.body: Nature Made GLP-1 Companion and Ora GLP-1 Up handle nutrient shortfalls and nausea at an approachable price. They are the sensible add-ons once your protein and testing bases are covered.

zh-tw.commentary: 如果你正在打 GLP-1 減重針，想找搭配的營養品，我的建議很直接，第一個要看的就是肌肉保留這一項，這也是這週 Thorne 的 GLP-1 Support Stack 繼續坐穩第一的原因。七月九號 Oh!mino 剛發布一份超過五百人的使用者調查，數字很嚇人，打針掉的體重裡有四成可能是肌肉。這個缺口就是搭配型營養品要補的地方。Thorne 拿第一，靠的是紮實的肌肉支援配方加上 NSF 等級的第三方檢驗，這個類別法規很鬆，能過第三方檢驗的品牌真的值這個錢。Youtheory Muscle Guard 跟 Transparent Labs 乳清分離蛋白緊跟在後，蛋白質加白胺酸是目前證據最充足的護肌方式，食慾被壓下去的時候特別重要。如果你的困擾是想吐跟吃不下，Nature Made GLP-1 Companion 跟 Ora GLP-1 Up 顧到營養補洞跟腸胃這一塊，價格也親民，差不多一杯手搖飲的錢就能顧一天。這領域研究進展很快，史丹佛六月發表了老鼠實驗，找到能在減重期間促進肌肉修復的成分，HTBA 今年也要在 Vitafoods 推專門護肌的 GLP-1 原料，這個貨架之後只會更擠。現階段的順序很清楚，先看第三方檢驗，再看蛋白質，剩下的當保險。這週排名維持不動，因為新調查是印證了方向，沒有翻盤。

highlights.title: 掉肌肉才是真風險
highlights.body: 七月 Oh!mino 的調查顯示，打 GLP-1 掉的體重有四成可能是肌肉。這個數字就是為什麼這裡每個上榜品都主打護肌，也是為什麼蛋白質加重訓要一起排進計畫。

highlights.title: Thorne 贏在檢驗
highlights.body: Thorne 的 GLP-1 Support Stack 有可信的護肌配方，還過了嚴格的第三方驗證。這個類別上架前幾乎沒人管，能驗證純度的品牌才值得你信任。

highlights.title: 蛋白質是主角
highlights.body: Youtheory Muscle Guard 跟 Transparent Labs 乳清分離蛋白排名高，因為乳清加白胺酸是護肌證據最足的路。真要只買一樣，就買好的蛋白粉。

highlights.body: Nature Made GLP-1 Companion 跟 Ora GLP-1 Up 顧營養缺口跟想吐感，價格好入手。蛋白質跟檢驗顧好之後，這兩款是很合理的加購。

en.commentary: Every data point this week points the same direction: on a GLP-1, the weight you keep off matters far less than the muscle you hold onto. An Oh!mino survey of GLP-1 users published July 9 found 88 percent maintained strength and 92 percent reported better recovery once they paired their medication with targeted protein and amino acid support, and that lines up with what I keep seeing in real usage. Lean mass can make up a quarter to 40 percent of total weight lost on these drugs, so the whole point of a companion stack is to shift that ratio. That is exactly why the Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack stays my number one. It covers the two things that actually move the needle here, muscle-preserving amino acids and the micronutrients appetite suppression tends to starve you of, and it does it with third-party testing I trust at 9.8. Youtheory Muscle Guard and Transparent Labs Whey Isolate hold second and third because protein intake around resistance training is the single most reliable lever for keeping strength while the pounds come off. Nature Made's Companion earns its spot on pure value and daily convenience for people who just want the nutrient gaps filled without thinking about it. New muscle-focused ingredients like HTBA's Leanara are coming, but nothing shipping this week changes the order.

highlights.title: Muscle is the whole game
highlights.body: With lean mass at 25 to 40 percent of GLP-1 weight loss, I weight muscle preservation heaviest. Thorne and the two protein picks all deliver here.

highlights.title: Survey backs the protein-first approach
highlights.body: Oh!mino's July 9 survey saw 88 percent keep strength and 92 percent recover better when pairing meds with amino and protein support.

highlights.title: Thorne's testing seals number one
highlights.body: A 9.8 on purity and third-party testing matters when you are on medication daily. Thorne's stack is the one I trust to be exactly what the label says.

highlights.title: Value pick for the practical buyer
highlights.body: Nature Made GLP-1 Companion covers nutrient gaps cheaply and simply. If you want set-and-forget micronutrient coverage, it is the smart everyday buy.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜的資料全指向同一件事，打GLP-1減重，體重掉多少其實沒那麼重要，能守住多少肌肉才是關鍵。Oh!mino在7月9號公布的使用者調查裡，88%的人搭配針對性的蛋白質跟胺基酸補充後維持住了力量，92%覺得恢復變好，這跟我實際觀察到的狀況完全對得上。這類藥物掉的體重裡，有四分之一到四成是瘦體組織，所以搭配補充品的整個意義就是把這個比例扳回來。這也是為什麼Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack穩坐我的第一名。它把真正有用的兩件事都顧到了，保肌的胺基酸，加上食慾被壓下去後最容易缺的微量營養素，而且第三方檢測拿到9.8，我很信得過。Youtheory Muscle Guard跟Transparent Labs乳清分離蛋白排二三名，說真的，重訓前後補足蛋白質就是掉重時保住力量最可靠的一招。Nature Made Companion靠的是划算跟每天吃都方便，適合只想補齊營養缺口、懶得動腦的人，一個月的錢大概就一頓火鍋。HTBA的Leanara這類新保肌成分快上市了，但這週出貨的東西還不足以改動排名。

highlights.title: 保肌才是重點
highlights.body: GLP-1掉的體重有兩到四成是瘦體組織，所以我把保肌權重放最高。Thorne加上兩款蛋白質選手在這塊都很到位。

highlights.body: Oh!mino 7月9號的調查顯示，搭配胺基酸與蛋白質補充後，88%維持力量、92%恢復更好，數字很有說服力。

highlights.title: Thorne檢測拿下第一
highlights.body: 天天配藥吃，純度與第三方檢測9.8就很重要。Thorne這組我敢說標示寫什麼裡面就是什麼。

highlights.title: 實用派的划算首選
highlights.body: Nature Made GLP-1 Companion便宜又單純把營養缺口補起來。想無腦補微量營養素，這款每天吃最聰明。

en.commentary: The Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack keeps my top spot because it does the whole job in one place: muscle support, nutrient gap coverage, and digestive help, backed by the cleanest third-party testing on this list. That last point matters more every week, because the fresh reporting this cycle keeps hammering the same finding, that GLP-1 users can lose 25 to 40 percent of their weight as lean mass without the right protein and training. When the stakes are your muscle, I want a stack I can trust down to the certificate of analysis, and Thorne delivers that. I raised the muscle score on Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein this week because the newest 2026 protein playbooks converge on 1.6 to 2.2 grams of protein per kilogram of body weight paired with resistance training, and a dedicated 25 to 40 gram whey serving is the single most effective lever a GLP-1 user has. Muscle Guard's high-protein, per-serving design fits that target cleanly, so it stays a strong number two. Transparent Labs Whey Isolate holds third as the purest straight-protein pick for people who just want a tested isolate to hit their grams. For most readers I point to Thorne when you want a complete tested stack, Youtheory or Transparent Labs when protein is the priority, and Nature Made GLP-1 Companion when budget and convenience lead.

highlights.body: Thorne for a complete tested stack, Youtheory or Transparent Labs when protein leads, Nature Made when budget and convenience matter most.

en.commentary: This week made the case for the whole category clearer, so my top pick stands. The Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack keeps first because it addresses the two problems that actually bite GLP-1 users, muscle loss and nutrient gaps, with the cleanest third-party testing on the list. A fresh Oh!mino survey published July 9 found that muscle-loss worry is now the leading concern reshaping how people eat on these medications, and the American Diabetes Association notes lean mass can account for roughly a quarter to two-fifths of the weight lost. That is exactly why muscle preservation carries so much weight in my scoring. The Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein holds second on the strength of the highest muscle score here, a smart choice when appetite is suppressed and you need protein density in a small serving. Transparent Labs Whey Isolate stays third for anyone who wants a clean, thoroughly tested protein above all. On the practical side, the Nature Made GLP-1 Companion remains the value and convenience leader, a simple daily that covers the vitamin and mineral gaps without fuss, and the Ora GLP-1 Up is still my pick when nausea and digestion are the main struggle. My guidance is unchanged: prioritize protein and third-party testing first, then fill nutrient gaps, and pick the digestion support only if the side effects warrant it.

highlights.title: Thorne leads on testing and coverage
highlights.body: It tackles muscle loss and nutrient gaps together with the cleanest third-party testing here, which is why it holds first as GLP-1 use keeps climbing.

highlights.title: Muscle preservation is the story
highlights.body: A July 9 Oh!mino survey names muscle-loss worry the top concern, and the ADA notes lean mass can be a quarter to two-fifths of weight lost, so this factor weighs heavily.

highlights.title: Muscle Guard is the protein play
highlights.body: The highest muscle score on the list makes it the pick when appetite is suppressed and you need dense protein in a small serving.

highlights.title: Value stays with Nature Made
highlights.body: The GLP-1 Companion covers vitamin and mineral gaps in one simple daily, holding the top value and convenience scores in the field.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜把整個類別的重點講得更清楚，所以我的第一名不動。Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack 守住第一，因為它正面處理 GLP-1 使用者真正會遇到的兩個麻煩，肌肉流失跟營養缺口，而且第三方檢測是這份榜單裡最乾淨的。七月九號 Oh!mino 發布的一份新調查發現，肌肉流失的擔憂現在是重新形塑大家在用藥期間怎麼吃的頭號問題，美國糖尿病協會也指出，減掉的體重裡瘦體組織大概占四分之一到五分之二。這正是為什麼肌肉保留在我的評分裡分量這麼重。Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein 靠這裡最高的肌肉分數守住第二，食慾被壓下去、需要小份量高蛋白密度的時候，它是聰明的選擇。Transparent Labs Whey Isolate 續居第三，適合最在意乾淨、檢測徹底的蛋白的人。實用面上，Nature Made GLP-1 Companion 還是價值跟方便性的雙料領先，一天一顆把維生素礦物質缺口補起來，簡單不囉唆，而 Ora GLP-1 Up 一樣是我在噁心跟消化是主要困擾時的首選。我的建議沒變，先顧蛋白質跟第三方檢測，再補營養缺口，副作用真的擾人再挑消化支援。

en.commentary: The Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack keeps my number one spot, and this week only reinforced why. Industry coverage is now openly framing muscle loss, nutrient gaps, and nausea as the three problems every GLP-1 user has to solve, and Thorne is the one stack that hits all three with NSF Certified for Sport testing behind it. That 9.8 testing score is the whole ballgame when you are already taking a prescription and cannot afford a sketchy label. Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein holds second because muscle preservation is the story of 2026. New coverage points to a wave of protein-forward and medical-food launches aimed squarely at protecting lean mass during rapid weight loss, and Youtheory's 9.8 muscle score already speaks that language at a friendly price. Transparent Labs Whey Isolate stays third as the purist's protein pick, clean label and a 9.6 muscle score, though its thinner nutrient coverage keeps it just behind. Nature Made GLP-1 Companion remains my best value at rank four, with the top 9.6 value score and a format simple enough that people actually stick with it. Ora GLP-1 Up holds fifth for anyone whose main complaint is nausea and constipation, since its digestion score of 9.4 leads that lane. I kept the board unchanged because the news this week validated the existing order rather than upending it. Protein first, then a tested multivitamin, then target your worst side effect. That sequence still wins.

highlights.title: Nature Made is the value king
highlights.body: The top 9.6 value score and a simple format mean people actually stick with it. It holds rank four as my budget pick.

highlights.title: Order sequence still wins
highlights.body: Protein first, then a tested multivitamin, then target your worst side effect. This week's news validated the existing board rather than upending it.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack 還是我的第一名，這週的消息只是讓我更確定。現在整個產業的報導都直接把肌肉流失、營養缺口、噁心這三件事，講成每個 GLP-1 使用者都得解決的問題，而 Thorne 就是唯一一套三個全打到、背後還有 NSF Sport 認證撐腰的組合。當你已經在吃處方藥，實在賭不起一張來路不明的成分標，那 9.8 的檢驗分數就是決勝關鍵。Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein 守在第二，因為保住肌肉就是 2026 的主旋律。新的報導點出一整波主打蛋白質跟醫療食品的新品，全都瞄準快速減重時保護瘦肉組織這件事，而 Youtheory 9.8 的肌肉分數早就在講這套語言，價格又親民。Transparent Labs Whey Isolate 排第三，是純粹派的蛋白質首選，成分乾淨、肌肉分數 9.6，只是營養覆蓋面薄了點，剛好卡在後面。Nature Made GLP-1 Companion 排第四，還是我心中的性價比之王，9.6 的性價比全榜最高，劑型又簡單到大家真的吃得下去。Ora GLP-1 Up 守第五，主要困擾是噁心跟便祕的人選它，消化分數 9.4 是這條路線的領先者。我這週維持不動，因為新聞是在印證現有排序，不是推翻它。先補蛋白質，再補一顆有檢驗的綜合維他命，最後對付你最嚴重的副作用，這個順序還是最穩。

highlights.title: Thorne 三個問題全解
highlights.body: 肌肉流失、營養缺口、噁心是每個人都會遇到的三連擊，Thorne 三個全打到還有 NSF Sport 認證。9.8 的檢驗分數讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: 保肌肉是 2026 主旋律
highlights.body: 一整波主打蛋白質的新品瞄準快速減重時的瘦肉保護。Youtheory Muscle Guard 9.8 的肌肉分數早就在講這套，價格又親民。

highlights.title: Nature Made 是性價比王
highlights.body: 9.6 的性價比全榜最高，劑型又簡單到大家真的吃得下去。它守住第四名，是我的預算首選。

highlights.title: 補充順序還是最穩
highlights.body: 先蛋白質，再一顆有檢驗的綜合維他命，最後對付最嚴重的副作用。這週的新聞是印證現有排序，不是推翻它。

references.title: Oh!mino Survey Finds GLP-1 Muscle Loss Concerns Drive New Focus on Preserving Muscle
Drug enhances muscle repair during GLP-1 weight-loss treatment in mice
The Best Supplements for GLP-1 Weight Loss Treatment Users 2026

en.commentary: The Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack keeps the top spot, and this week gives me even more reason to hold it there. A July 9 survey of GLP-1 medication users put hard numbers on what clinicians have been saying for a year, that lean body mass can account for a quarter to 40 percent of total weight lost on these drugs. That single fact reorders how I weight this category. The Thorne stack earns its lead because it treats the whole problem at once. It bundles electrolytes, an amino complex, a probiotic, and a foundational multivitamin, so it covers nutrient gaps, hydration, digestion, and muscle support in one system, and its third-party testing rigor is the best in the field. YouTheory Muscle Guard Protein stays at number two because muscle preservation is the headline concern right now, and a dedicated high-protein formula is the most direct answer to it. Transparent Labs Whey Isolate holds third on the same logic paired with excellent purity. The Nature Made GLP-1 Companion remains the value and convenience champion at number four, and it is the easiest on-ramp for someone starting a companion routine. For digestion-first users fighting nausea, Ora GLP-1 Up stays the specialist pick at five. My advice this week leans harder toward protein and muscle. If you take a GLP-1 drug and resistance-train, prioritize protein and creatine, and let a stack like Thorne fill the gaps around it.

highlights.title: Thorne covers the whole problem
highlights.body: Electrolytes, aminos, a probiotic, and a multivitamin in one system address nutrient gaps, hydration, digestion, and muscle at once, backed by the best third-party testing in the field.

highlights.title: New data hardens the muscle case
highlights.body: A July 9 survey underlined that lean mass can be a quarter to 40 percent of GLP-1 weight loss. That reinforces why protein-forward picks sit near the top.

highlights.title: Protein products earn their ranks
highlights.body: YouTheory Muscle Guard and Transparent Labs Whey Isolate hold two and three because a dedicated high-protein formula is the most direct answer to muscle loss.

highlights.title: Nature Made is the easy start
highlights.body: The GLP-1 Companion stays the value and convenience champion at number four, the simplest on-ramp for someone beginning a companion routine.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack 這週還是第一，而且這禮拜給了我更多理由把它擺在這。七月九號一份針對 GLP-1 用藥者的調查，把醫生講了一年的事情變成硬數字，就是打這類藥掉的體重裡，肌肉可以占到四分之一到四成。這一個數據就重新排了我對這個類別的權重。Thorne 這組能領先，是因為它一次處理整個問題。它把電解質、胺基酸複方、益生菌、基礎綜合維他命包在一起，一套就顧到營養缺口、補水、消化跟肌肉支持，而且第三方檢驗的嚴謹度是全場最好的。YouTheory Muscle Guard Protein 守住第二，因為現在最受關注的就是保住肌肉，一款專門的高蛋白配方就是最直接的答案。Transparent Labs Whey Isolate 守住第三，一樣的邏輯加上很棒的純度。Nature Made GLP-1 Companion 還是性價比跟方便性冠軍，排第四，對剛開始搭配保健的人來說是最好上手的入門款。以消化為主、在對抗噁心的人，Ora GLP-1 Up 守住第五的專門位。我這週的建議更偏向蛋白質跟肌肉。你要是在打 GLP-1 又有做重訓，優先顧好蛋白質跟肌酸，剩下的缺口再交給 Thorne 這種組合去補。

highlights.title: Thorne 一次處理整個問題
highlights.body: 電解質、胺基酸、益生菌、綜合維他命包成一套，同時顧營養缺口、補水、消化跟肌肉，第三方檢驗還是全場最嚴謹。

highlights.title: 新數據坐實肌肉議題
highlights.body: 七月九號的調查點明 GLP-1 掉的體重裡肌肉可占四分之一到四成。這更加坐實了為什麼蛋白質導向的品項排在前段。

highlights.title: 蛋白質產品排名有理
highlights.body: YouTheory Muscle Guard 跟 Transparent Labs Whey Isolate 守二三名，因為專門高蛋白配方就是對付肌肉流失最直接的答案。

highlights.title: Nature Made 最好上手
highlights.body: GLP-1 Companion 還是性價比跟方便冠軍，排第四，對剛開始搭配保健的人來說是最簡單的入門款。

references.title: GLP-1 obesity drugs mainly reduce fat while preserving muscle mass
Oh!mino Survey Finds GLP-1 Muscle Loss Concerns Drive New Focus on Preserving Muscle
GLP-1 Therapies in 2026: Beyond Blood Sugar and the Scale

en.commentary: The conversation around GLP-1 support keeps sharpening, and this month it landed squarely on muscle. Data presented at ECO 2026 showed that most weight lost on these medications is fat, with relative muscle mass largely preserved, but lean mass still makes up a meaningful share of the total, so protecting it remains the smart move. A fresh user survey this month reinforced how many people feel that concern day to day. That is why I keep the Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack at number one. Its third-party testing is the strongest in the category and its formula covers the nutrient gaps that appear when appetite drops hard, which is the situation most people on these drugs actually face. The Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein holds second because muscle preservation is the priority right now and a clean, high-protein format is the most direct tool for it. Transparent Labs Whey Isolate stays third for the same reason with a purity record I trust. In the middle, the Nature Made GLP-1 Companion remains my value pick, covering the vitamin and mineral basics at a price anyone can sustain, and the Ora GLP-1 Up keeps its spot for people whose main struggle is nausea and digestion. The evidence this month supports the existing order, so I am holding it and letting testing, protein, and nutrient coverage lead. This is general wellness information, not medical advice, so talk with your clinician before adding anything alongside a prescription.

highlights.title: Muscle is the headline this month
highlights.body: ECO 2026 data show most loss is fat with muscle largely preserved, yet lean mass is a real share of the total, so protecting it still matters.

highlights.title: Thorne earns the top on testing
highlights.body: The strongest third-party verification in the category plus broad nutrient coverage keeps it first for most people.

highlights.title: Protein does the heavy lifting
highlights.body: Youtheory Muscle Guard and Transparent Labs Whey Isolate rank high because a clean protein format is the most direct muscle tool.

highlights.title: Value and digestion covered
highlights.body: Nature Made Companion handles the vitamin basics affordably, while Ora GLP-1 Up targets nausea and digestive comfort.

zh-tw.commentary: GLP-1 輔助補給的討論越來越聚焦，這個月直接落在肌肉這件事上。ECO 2026 發表的數據顯示，用這類藥物減下來的體重大部分是脂肪，相對肌肉量大致保留住，但瘦體組織仍然佔了總量不小的比例，所以保護它還是聰明的做法。這個月一份使用者調查也再次證實，很多人日常真的會在意這一點。所以我把 Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack 留在第一。它的第三方檢測是這個類別裡最扎實的，配方也補齊了食慾大幅下降後會出現的營養缺口，而這正是多數用藥的人實際會遇到的狀況。Youtheory Muscle Guard Protein 守住第二，因為現在的重點就是保肌，乾淨的高蛋白形式是最直接的工具。Transparent Labs Whey Isolate 基於同樣理由守住第三，純度紀錄我很信任。中段的 Nature Made GLP-1 Companion 依舊是我的高 CP 值選擇，把維生素礦物質基本盤顧好，價格也讓人吃得長久，Ora GLP-1 Up 則守住位置，適合主要困擾在噁心跟消化的人。這個月的證據支持現有順序，所以我維持不動，讓檢測、蛋白質跟營養覆蓋帶頭。這是一般保健資訊，不是醫療建議，搭配處方前請先跟你的醫師討論。

highlights.title: 這個月重點在肌肉
highlights.body: ECO 2026 數據顯示大多減的是脂肪、肌肉大致保留，但瘦體組織仍佔總量不小比例，保護它還是重要。

highlights.title: Thorne 靠檢測拿第一
highlights.body: 類別裡最扎實的第三方驗證加上廣泛營養覆蓋，讓它對多數人來說穩坐第一。

highlights.title: 蛋白質是主力
highlights.body: Youtheory Muscle Guard 跟 Transparent Labs Whey Isolate 排前面，因為乾淨蛋白是最直接的保肌工具。

highlights.title: CP 值跟消化都顧到
highlights.body: Nature Made Companion 便宜地顧好維生素基本盤，Ora GLP-1 Up 則針對噁心跟消化不適。

references.title: Oh!mino Survey Finds GLP-1 Muscle Loss Concerns Drive New Focus on Preserving Muscle While Dieting
HTBA to unveil GLP-1 support ingredient for muscle health and energy at Vitafoods Europe 2026
GLP-1 Therapies in 2026: Beyond Blood Sugar and the Scale

en.commentary: The story this month is muscle, and it sharpens exactly why my board is ordered the way it is. Fresh survey data and new clinical commentary keep landing on the same point: lean body mass can make up roughly a quarter to 40 percent of the weight people lose on GLP-1 medications, so protein and muscle support are the job, not an afterthought. That is why the Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack stays first, since it pairs the widest nutrient-gap coverage with the cleanest third-party testing, and on these drugs I want purity I can verify. The Youtheory Muscle Guard protein holds a strong second because it does the single most important thing well, delivering the protein dose that preserves lean mass, and this month's evidence only reinforces that priority. Transparent Labs whey isolate keeps third as the purist's protein for anyone who wants a clean isolate and nothing else. Further down, the Nature Made companion earns its place on value and convenience, and the digestion-focused picks stay put for people whose main complaint is nausea. I held scores steady because no product changed, only the conversation got louder. If you are on a GLP-1, treat protein as the priority, verify testing, and layer in digestive support only if you actually need it.

highlights.title: Muscle preservation is the whole point
highlights.body: New survey and clinical commentary keep repeating that lean mass can be a quarter to 40 percent of weight lost on these drugs. Protein support is the job, which anchors my top of the board.

highlights.title: Thorne stays first on coverage plus testing
highlights.body: The widest nutrient-gap coverage paired with the cleanest third-party verification. On medications you want purity you can confirm, so Thorne holds the top spot.

highlights.title: Youtheory Muscle Guard nails the priority
highlights.body: It delivers the protein dose that actually preserves lean mass, and this month's evidence only reinforces why that matters most. It keeps a strong second.

highlights.title: Add digestion support only if you need it
highlights.body: The nausea-focused picks stay put and earn their place for people whose main issue is digestion. If that is not your problem, spend on protein and testing instead.

zh-tw.commentary: 這個月的重點就是肌肉，而這正好講清楚我榜單為什麼這樣排。新的問卷數據跟臨床評論一直指向同一件事：打 GLP-1 減重藥的人掉的體重，大概有四分之一到四成是瘦體組織，所以補蛋白、顧肌肉才是正事，不是隨便附加的。這就是 Thorne GLP-1 Support Stack 繼續第一的原因，它同時給到最完整的營養缺口補充跟最乾淨的第三方檢驗，在吃這種藥的情況下，我要的是可以驗證的純度。Youtheory Muscle Guard 蛋白穩坐第二，因為它把最重要的那件事做好了，給足能保住瘦體組織的蛋白劑量，這個月的研究只是更加強調這個優先順序。Transparent Labs 乳清分離蛋白守第三，純粹派的蛋白選擇，你只想要乾淨的分離蛋白、其他都不要，就選它。再往下 Nature Made 那款靠性價比跟方便站得住，顧腸胃那幾款也留原位，給主要困擾是噁心反胃的人。我分數維持不動，因為產品本身沒變，只是討論聲量變大了。你在打 GLP-1 的話，把蛋白當第一優先，檢驗要看清楚，真的有需要再加腸胃支援。

highlights.title: 保住肌肉才是重點
highlights.body: 新問卷跟臨床評論一直重複：這類藥掉的體重有四分之一到四成是瘦體組織。補蛋白才是正事，這就是我榜單前段的定錨。

highlights.title: Thorne 靠完整加檢驗守第一
highlights.body: 最完整的營養缺口補充配上最乾淨的第三方檢驗。吃藥的情況下你要的是可以驗證的純度，所以 Thorne 守住第一。

highlights.title: Youtheory Muscle Guard 打中重點
highlights.body: 它給足能保住瘦體組織的蛋白劑量，這個月的研究只是更強調這件事最重要。穩坐第二。

highlights.title: 腸胃支援有需要再加
highlights.body: 顧噁心那幾款留原位，給主要困擾是腸胃的人。如果那不是你的問題，錢花在蛋白跟檢驗上更實在。
